channel.title: Ens on Saurabh Kale

item.title: Experience
item.description:
[[experience]] role = “Senior Developer” company = “Tech Solutions Inc.” company_link = “https://www.techsolutions.com” # Add company URL here period = “Jan 2020 - Present” country = “USA” # New field for region/country

description = “Longer description of the role…” # Optional detailed description

responsibilities = [ “Developed and maintained web applications.”, “Collaborated with cross-functional teams.”, “Led junior developers.” ] technologies = [“Go”, “Docker”, “Kubernetes”, “React”]

[[experience]] role = “Software Engineer” company = “Innovate LLC”
